repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

commit.message:
Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

- E3: zoom only (removed shift+E3 vertical scale)
- E4: vertical scale for all modes (was shift+E3)
- E5: gain/normalize in trim/loop, threshold in slice auto (was E4)
- E7 touch+twist: toggle loop on/off
- E8 touch+twist: snap to zero crossing
- Twist prompts stay visible while knob is touched
- Add snapToZeroCrossing() helper function
- Recording waveform: scrolling write-head visualization
- Recording stop: poll for sampler finalization before loading
- Shift+pad preview: 5% of selection, clamped 0.25s-5s
- Update help.json for new knob layout

  reduce max candidates 15->12 to prevent timeout on delisted stocks

Fix macOS and Windows build failures: guard glibc-specific malloc_trim

malloc.h and malloc_trim() are Linux glibc-specific. Guard both with
#ifdef __linux__ to fix build on macOS (missing header) and Windows/MinGW
(undeclared function).

commit.message:
Add price source diagnostic tool to admin Trading Control tab

Adds a POST /api/admin/price-diagnostic backend route that independently
tests SPY price retrieval through Tiingo (IEX + EOD fallback), Alpaca
paper/live (getLatestTrade + bar fallback, run in parallel), and
historical parquet (DuckDB query). Returns structured JSON with per-source
price, timestamp, age, latency, and error details.

Adds PriceSourceDiagnosticCard component inserted between Window Timing
Settings and Execute Open Window Trades cards, with a Check Price Sources
button that calls the diagnostic endpoint and renders all four source
results inline.

fix: pull Xero bank statement lines for reconciliation (v5.39.5)

The /BankTransactions endpoint only returns manually-created Spend/
Receive Money entries — not bank feed statement lines. Added
accounting.statements.read scope and fetchBankStatementsFromXero()
to pull statement lines from all active bank accounts. Statement
lines are stored in the same XeroBankTransaction table for unified
reconciliation.

Note: users must disconnect and reconnect Xero to grant the new
scope.

- Frontend: ReactJS + Axios + Nginx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Add meaningful progress reporting to verify tool during council deliberation

The verify MCP tool previously reported progress as 3 hardcoded steps
(null -> 67% -> complete) with no updates during the 30-180s deliberation.

Now run_verification() accepts an on_progress callback and reports:
- Per-model completions in Stage 1 (bridged from stage1_collect_responses_with_status)
- Stage transitions (Stage 2: Peer review, Stage 3: Synthesizing verdict)
- Dynamic step count based on actual model count (num_models + 3)
- Monotonic progress via max() to handle out-of-order model completions

The MCP verify() tool bridges ctx.report_progress to the callback.
Backward compatible: on_progress defaults to None.

Closes #326

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Chris <chris@amiable.dev>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): resolve all lint errors and Node 18 vitest ESM config failure

- Rename vitest.config.js → vitest.config.mjs so Node 18 can load it
  without ERR_REQUIRE_ESM (vite uses ESM, .js extension was treated as CJS)
- Add ESLint config block for test/**/*.js (ESM) with Node globals:
  process, console, setTimeout, clearTimeout, Buffer, URL — fixes all
  no-undef errors in scenario test files
- Fix 64 lib/ and test/ lint errors:
  - Prefix unused graceful-degradation vars with _ (RetryPolicyEngine,
    AGENT_FAILURE_TYPES, genericBackoff, failureType)
  - Remove unused path/fs requires in diagnostic-hooks.cjs
  - Add { cause: err } to re-thrown errors in mock-github, mock-gsd-agent,
    state.cjs, loadFixture.js (preserve-caught-error rule)
  - Fix useless assignments: projectData null init in state.cjs, resolve
    reassignment in retry-policy.cjs backoff Promise (restructured to
    properly clean up abort listener), intermediate state assignments in
    pipeline-transitions tests, aborted flag + break redundancy in
    milestone-execution tests
  - Remove stale eslint-disable-next-line comments that no longer suppress
    anything

feat(m1): live config cache with M5 StreamConfigUpdates (M1.3) (#28)

Add a watch-channel-based config cache that subscribes to M5's
StreamConfigUpdates gRPC stream for real-time experiment config updates.
Falls back to local JSON config when M5_ADDR is not set.

New modules:
- config_cache: ConfigCache (producer) + ConfigCacheHandle (reader)
  backed by tokio::sync::watch. ~5ns snapshot reads.
- stream_client: Background gRPC client with exponential backoff
  reconnection (1s→30s with jitter).

Changes:
- service.rs: Arc<Config> → ConfigCacheHandle, added from_config()
  for backward-compatible test usage
- main.rs: Fallback chain startup with graceful shutdown via
  CancellationToken
- config.rs: Added Config::from_experiments_and_layers() constructor

9 new config cache tests + all 11 existing assignment tests pass.

commit.message:
Fix broken Cars & Classic listing URLs

The scraper was constructing URLs using item.id with a /l/ prefix
(e.g. /l/C2132156), but the correct URL comes from item.url in the
Inertia.js data (e.g. /car/C2021811) — a completely different ID.
All 21 C&C links were returning 404.

Now uses item.url directly, falling back to /car/{slug} if missing.
Regenerated Ferrari 599 data with correct URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(gateway): API proxy config + credential injection (CAB-1723, CAB-1724) (#1516)

## Summary
- **CAB-1723**: Add `ApiProxyConfig` and `ProxyBackendConfig` structs
with per-backend feature flags for incremental rollout.
`ApiProxyRegistry` runtime registry with hot-reload support.
- **CAB-1724**: Implement `/proxy/{backend}/*` handler with credential
injection from `CredentialStore`. Supports static auth (API key, Bearer,
Basic) and OAuth2 client_credentials token fetch.

Part of **CAB-1722** (STOA Dogfooding — Zero Direct API Keys) Phase 1.

### Architecture
- `/proxy/<backend>/<path>` — separate from `/mcp/*` and `/apis/*`
(Council adjustment #4)
- Each backend individually toggled via feature flags
- Credential injection keyed by `api-proxy:{backend}` in existing
`CredentialStore`
- `X-Stoa-Proxy-Backend` response header for observability
- Admin endpoint: `GET /admin/api-proxy/backends`

### Config example (YAML)
```yaml
api_proxy:
  enabled: true
  require_auth: true
  backends:
    linear:
      enabled: true
      base_url: "https://api.linear.app"
      rate_limit_rpm: 120
      timeout_secs: 15
      allowed_paths: ["/graphql"]
    pushgateway:
      enabled: true
      base_url: "http://pushgateway:9091"
      rate_limit_rpm: 0
```

## Test plan
- [x] 10 new config tests (deserialization, defaults, backend map)
- [x] 6 new registry tests (filter disabled, reload, hot-swap)
- [x] 1 handler test (client creation)
- [x] All 1635 existing tests pass
- [x] Clippy zero warnings
- [x] `cargo fmt --check` clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
